title: Todd Blanche faces high-stakes confirmation hearing for attorney general
description: Blanche won Senate confirmation early in President Trump's second term to serve as the No. 2 official at the Justice Department. Now he faces a contentious hearing as he seeks the top job.

title: CDC director nominee Erica Schwartz faces Senate for confirmation hearing
description: Dr. Erica Schwartz, Trump's nominee for CDC director, faces the Senate health committee for her confirmation hearing on July 15. If confirmed, she will lead an agency dealing with workforce and leadership shortages, and new layers of political review.

title: Trump will speak on elections in Thursday primetime address
description: The speech comes as President Trump has escalated calls for Republicans to pass tighter federal voting rules for November's midterm elections.

title: Gov. Hochul orders a pause on data centers in New York for up to a year
description: New York Gov. Kathy Hochul signed an order pausing construction of large data centers — the first statewide pause in the country.

title: In the aftermath of deadly shootings, ICE pauses most traffic stops
description: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement will pause non-urgent vehicle stops after two deadly shootings in less than a week, Maine U.S. Sen. Angus King's office tells NPR.

title: Investigative journalist reports on the abuse inside ICE's largest detention facility
description: The New Yorker writer Jonathan Blitzer says thousands of people are being held in tents in the El Paso desert, where inhumane conditions have become a tool to pressure people to accept deportation.

title: 'The Trojan Teddy Bear': The promise and peril of childhood in the age of AI
description: AI is moving beyond chatbots and into toys, dolls, and robots built to befriend children. A leading child-development expert says the technology offers real promise — but also risks crowding out the human relationships children need most.

title: South Carolina's governor appoints Lindsey Graham's sister to serve out his term
description: South Carolina Gov. Henry McMaster says he is appointing Darline Graham to finish the term of her late brother, former Republican Sen. Lindsey Graham, who died in office Saturday at age 71.

title: Some states will ask voters to make it harder to pass constitutional amendments
description: Several states have ballot measures this year that could raise the thresholds needed to pass state constitutional amendments. Many advocates are critical of such limits on direct democracy.

title: Platner's voters are reeling as Maine Democratic Party races to choose his replacement
description: Graham Platner generated enthusiasm in Maine with his progressive policies. Now he's out of the race, and his supporters have to decide what's next, as Maine Democrats prepare to choose a nominee.

title: Pat Oliphant, prizewinning giant of political cartooning, dies at 90
description: The Pulitzer Prize-winning cartoonist skewered presidents from Johnson to Trump, reaching a vast audience through syndication.

title: Darline Graham Nordone has little political history beyond praising her brother
description: Darline Graham Nordone, the late Sen. Lindsey Graham’s younger sister, received the backing of President Donald Trump and Sen. Tim Scott to serve out the remainder of her brother’s term.

title: Lindsey Graham’s sister picked to serve the rest of his Senate term
description: South Carolina Gov. Henry McMaster (R) announced his selection of Darline Graham Nordone to serve into January. She is expected to be sworn in Tuesday.
